raw_message: [Thread - Mehta Industries Claim] Vidushi M (Jan 15): Hey @Vaishnavi Bhat any updates on this? | Vaishnavi Bhat (Jan 16): We are awaiting revert from IL. | Vidushi M (Jan 19): Hey @Vaishnavi Bhat could you please expedite this, the user is not okay with the delay. Potential escalation for social media and he has mentioned he is going to take this up with IRDAI. | Arun Saseedharan (Jan 30): @Avik Bhandari for your eyes - we spoke yesterday. This might go as social escalation.

Hey @Ipsita @Arun Chacko - following the recent call where their director was also present, discussion did not go as expected. As you suggested please draft an email outlining the relevant claim details along with the proposed next steps for the employee. Simultaneously we can involve @Avik Bhandari to escalate this with the insurer to ensure resolution at the earliest. Kindly let us know if anything else is required from our side.

Hi @Rather Faisal one more change we need to make: GWP (Exc GST) For All Products Sold should be INR 1,53,991 + GST - can you make the changes on SF for the GMC & GPA opp please. [Susmita]: @Manashi all the information provided are incorrect starting from premium to EIDs. Dashboard was set up and policy is also placed. To change the EIDs now we have to take product help and the whole onboarding has to be restarted. From what I understand this is a very sensitive customer. @Vakti Vedant Panda FYI @Manashi please help manage any escalation here @Akshay Golechha @Avik Bhandari @Prakrut

@Avik Bhandari for your eyes - Globex account claim might go as social escalation. Customer mentioned IRDAI and legal action. We spoke yesterday, need your guidance on next steps urgently. The claim has been pending for 3 weeks and insurer is not responding.

BF5278 - Disqualified DUR Pendency Closed - @Rajorshi can you get this reviewed once again just to be sure of the DURs raised? I am assuming these are mandatory docs hence the claim was closed. The employee is very distressed and HR is escalating to their MD.
